title: Clint Eastwood
why_this_song: Clint Eastwood by Gorillaz (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 36 times; first heard in: "The future is coming on"
Appears 27 times; first heard in: "It's coming on"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "The future is coming on"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I ain't happy, I'm feeling glad"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I ain't happy, I'm feeling glad"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "coming" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "coming" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I got sunshine in a bag
I'm useless, but not for long

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Gorillaz one question about "Clint Eastwood", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Gorillaz sobre "Clint Eastwood", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Clint Eastwood" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Clint Eastwood" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Clint Eastwood" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Clint Eastwood" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
